description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park.Product DetailsRound toed black and red shoe with central lace-ups and perforations all over the upperPadded tongue and innerPlastic midsoleTwo piece TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
